props.name: particleCount
props.description: The number of particles to generate.

props.name: particleSpread
props.description: Controls how far particles are spread from the center.

props.name: speed
props.description: Speed factor controlling the animation pace.

props.name: particleColors
props.description: An array of hex color strings used to color the particles.

props.name: moveParticlesOnHover
props.description: Determines if particles should move in response to mouse hover.

props.name: particleHoverFactor
props.description: Multiplier for the particle movement when hovering.

props.name: alphaParticles
props.description: If true, particles are rendered with varying transparency; otherwise, as solid circles.

props.name: particleBaseSize
props.description: The base size of the particles.

props.name: sizeRandomness
props.description: Controls the variation in particle sizes (0 means all particles have the same size).

props.name: cameraDistance
props.description: Distance from the camera to the particle system.

props.name: disableRotation
props.description: If true, stops the particle system from rotating.

props.name: pixelRatio
props.description: Sets the pixel ratio for sharper rendering on high-DPI screens.
